title: Portfolio Website
description: A multi-page personal website built with HTML and CSS to showcase navigation, page structure, and basic styling techniques.

title: Landing Page Mockup
description: A responsive layout exercise focused on hierarchy, spacing, and clean section structure across different screen sizes.

title: Contact Form Exercise
description: A form project exploring semantic labels, accessible inputs, and practical layout patterns for contact information.

title: Resume Page
description: A structured resume built with sections, articles, lists, and time elements to create meaningful HTML content.

title: Navigation Styling
description: A styling exercise using Flexbox to create a consistent navigation bar with hover states and a current page marker.

title: Grid Practice
description: A CSS Grid experiment that arranges project cards into a responsive multi-column layout that adapts to viewport width.

title: Typography Study
description: A study in readable typography using line height, content width, and heading sizes to improve scanning and balance.

title: Semantic HTML Notes
description: An HTML practice page focused on using headings, paragraphs, articles, sections, and lists in a more meaningful way.

title: Accessibility Pass
description: A review of alt text, clear labels, and navigation cues to make the site easier to understand and use.

title: Visual Hierarchy Test
description: An experiment in contrast and spacing to make headings, cards, and supporting text feel more organized on the page.

title: Responsive Layout Drill
description: A responsive design drill testing how navigation, cards, and form controls behave across narrow and wide screens.

title: CSS Practice Sandbox
description: A sandbox page for experimenting with layout properties, borders, padding, alignment, and reusable page styles.
